name: Taylor & Francis Text and Data Mining API
description: Taylor & Francis provides API-based text and data mining access to subscribed and open-access content for non-commercial research purposes. Institutions notify Taylor & Francis in advance of TDM projects and receive technical assistance to access full-text content programmatically across journals and books indexed on tandfonline.com and taylorfrancis.com.

audience.description: Institutional researchers conducting non-commercial text and data mining projects

offers.description: Available for non-commercial research. Institutions must notify Taylor & Francis prior to TDM projects.
